tooltip.message: Copy an element using the Visual Inspector context menu.
tooltip.description: Tooltip message for the Visual Inspector context menu.

labelForInspVisualLigado.message: Activate the Visual Inspector to inspect elements.
labelForInspVisualLigado.description: Tooltip message when the Visual Inspector is deactivated.
Label indicating that the Visual Inspector is enabled.

labelForInspVisualDesligado.description: Label indicating that the Visual Inspector is disabled.

labelForInspVisualBloquearAoSobrepor.description: Label for the option to block the Visual Inspector when overlapping elements.

labelForInspVisualLeitorDeTela.description: Label for the option to enable screen reader support in the Visual Inspector.

labelForInspVisualOcultar.description: Label for the option to hide the Visual Inspector.

btnInfo.message:
1. To lock the inspector on the screen, tap it or press B.
2. To unlock it, if you only tapped the inspector, tap outside it.
3. Tap the "locked" button or press B again to unlock.
4. To hear the narration, enable the screen reader and click the page at least once.
5. Click one of the popup items to copy it.
btnInfo.description: Information message for the Visual Inspector.

info.message:
1. To lock the inspector on the screen, tap it or press B.
  2. To unlock it, if you only tapped the inspector, tap outside of it.
  3. Tap the 'locked' button or press B again to unlock.
  4. To hear the narration, enable the screen reader and click on the page at least once.
  5. Click one of the items in the popup to copy it.
info.description: Informational message for the Visual Inspector.
